programs.title: Freaky Ali
programs.desc: A sports comedy film that tells the story of a poor man who discovers his natural talent for golf and decides to pursue a career in the sport. With the help of his friend and coach, he enters a tournament to compete against professional golfers and prove himself. The movie highlights themes of determination, hard work, and overcoming social barriers in an entertaining and uplifting plot.

programs.title: Hawaizaada
programs.desc: The film which is based on the life on an Indian scientist Shivkar Bapuji Talpade, who is credited to have constructed India's first unmanned plane is the tale of the hardships that he went through on the journey to discover. Also the film is set in the pre-independence era of Bombay of 1895.

programs.title: Awara Paagal Deewana
programs.desc: A henpecked husband and his father-in-law are intrigued by their new neighbour Gulab Khatri, a recluse and mysterious man. They unwittingly get embroiled in a mafia rivalry when they find out that he's a wanted criminal.
